creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Hi!

This PR was sent for print/cups, but cups-genppd.5.2 actually belongs to
gutenprint-cups which you maintain.

----- Forwarded message from Gary Aitken <freebsd@dreamchaser.org> -----

Date: Thu, 23 Jan 2014 20:17:09 GMT
From: Gary Aitken <freebsd@dreamchaser.org>
To: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org
Subject: ports/186050: cups-genppd.5.2 needs a symlink


>Number:         186050
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       cups-genppd.5.2 needs a symlink
>Confidential:   no
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>State:          open
>Quarter:        
>Keywords:       
>Date-Required:
>Class:          sw-bug
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Arrival-Date:   Thu Jan 23 20:20:00 UTC 2014
>Closed-Date:
>Last-Modified:
>Originator:     Gary Aitken
>Release:        9.2 release
>Organization:
>Environment:
FreeBSD breakaway.dreamchaser.org 9.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.2-RELEASE #0 r255898: Thu Sep 26 22:50:31 UTC 2013     root@bake.isc.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

>Description:
when cups is installed, the following utilities are also installed:

/usr/local/sbin$ ls -l cups*
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  1362096 Jan 22 23:59 cups-genppd.5.2
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    26599 Jan 22 23:59 cups-genppdupdate
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     8416 Jan 22 23:54 cupsaccept
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    10032 Jan 22 23:54 cupsaddsmb
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     9960 Jan 22 23:54 cupsctl
-r-x------  1 root  wheel   398808 Jan 22 23:54 cupsd
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       10 Jan 22 23:54 cupsdisable -> cupsaccept
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       10 Jan 22 23:54 cupsenable -> cupsaccept
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    29712 Jan 22 23:54 cupsfilter
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       10 Jan 22 23:54 cupsreject -> cupsaccept

The man page for cups-genppdupdate SEE ALSO section references cups-genppdconfig.
I don't know about cups-genppdconfig, but there should be a symlink for cups-genppd -> cups-genppd.5.2
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
cd /usr/local/sbin
ln -s cups-genppd.5.2 cups-genppd

>Release-Note:
>Audit-Trail:
>Unformatted:
